Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

package in.co.rays.proj4.model
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CollegeModel
    College Business Model Tier functionality component.
    CourseModel
    Course Business Model Tier functionality component.
    FacultyModel
    Faculty Business Model Tier functionality component.
    MarksheetModel
    Marksheet Business Model Tier functionality component.
    RoleModel
    JDBC Implementation of Role Model to perform business logic and CRUD operations on the 'st_role' database table.
    StudentModel
    JDBC Implementation of Student Model to perform business logic and CRUD operations on the 'st_student' database table.
    SubjectModel
    JDBC Implementation of Subject Model to perform business logic and CRUD operations on the 'st_subject' database table.
    TimetableModel
    JDBC Implementation of Timetable Model.
    UserModel
    UserModel class handles all database operations related to User.
